title: Hubly Thinking Experience
transition: I think I have a really strong direction. Let me start building.

pressure_washing.signature: pressure_washing::412::Homeowners hire pressure washing for cur::I found that most pressure washing busin::Researching pressure washing businesses around Salt Lake City…|Most competitors compete on price.|Drafting homepage concepts…|The first version feels generic if we lead with price language.

aha.title: 💡 Aha!
aha.body: I found that most pressure washing businesses in your area bury their booking button below the fold.
aha.why: I'm putting yours at the top because I think it'll increase conversions.

why.decision: Pressure Washing with premium trust-first positioning
why.explanation: I'm recommending premium positioning because homeowners tend to value trust over the lowest price.

photography.signature: photography::286::Wedding clients hire photographers for e::Wedding photographers with strong behind::Researching photography businesses…|Many photographers lead with finished galleries only.|Drafting homepage concepts…|A stock-looking gallery homepage will feel interchangeable.

aha.title: 💡 Aha!
aha.body: Wedding photographers with strong behind-the-scenes photos tend to convert better than those with only finished galleries.
aha.why: I'm featuring that early so clients feel the experience, not just the portfolio.

why.explanation: I'm recommending premium positioning because wedding clients choose photographers who feel trustworthy and distinctive — not the cheapest.
